name: Bloom's Taxonomy
what_it_is: A hierarchy of cognitive skills: Remember, Understand, Apply, Analyze, Evaluate, Create.
core_mechanic: Map current learning level and target level. Design activities appropriate to each level - reading for Remember/Understand, problems for Apply, critique for Analyze, building for Create.
when_to_use: Designing a learning plan for a new skill / Feel you understand something but can't use it (stuck at Understand not Apply) / Assessing whether a resource matches what you need
when_not_to_use: Already know what to practice / Quick information lookup
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps current Bloom's level from input, identifies target level, designs 3 specific activities to climb from current to target.
